children.text: During an engine failure right after takeoff while flying a single-engine aeroplane

answers: gently turn back to the runway.
make a steep turn back to the runway.
maintain glide speed and attempt a restart.

children.text: The stall characteristics of a aeroplane would be most dangerous when the center of gravity is

answers: forward of the angle of attack.
forward of the center of lift.

children.text: A tricycle gear aeroplane is taxiing with a wind from the 10:30 clock position at 20 KT. The controls should be held

answers: right aileron up and neutral elevator.
left aileron up and neutral elevator.
right aileron up and down elevator.
correctAnswer: left aileron up and neutral elevator.

A dual ignition system in an aircraft provides

answers: sufficient current to charge the battery
